positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a glowing celestial constellation forming an abstract, powerful silhouette over a stylized mountain range at twilight. The central subject is a vibrant, energetic arc of starlight (the constellation), radiating soft, bioluminescent blues, deep purples, and neon magentas. The mountain silhouette should be sharply defined and dark charcoal gray, providing high contrast against the glowing sky. Composition should be centered, suitable for repeating pattern or single apparel print. Clean lines, high contrast, ethereal glow effect, gradient color wash, vector-art quality, flat graphic design style, dramatic lighting, ultra-detailed, 8k print quality, crisp edges.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermarks, text, low detail, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands, messy, watermark, gradient shadows
